title: Dev v0.5.5 Shared Database First Create Fix
notes:
Fixes Save All to Shared Database so it can create shared-dev/database.json the first time instead of failing with GitHub API 404.

Changes:
- Save All to Shared Database now creates shared-dev/database.json if it is missing.
- Save All still updates the file normally if it already exists.
- Refresh Shared Database gives a clearer message when the database does not exist yet.
- Save All result now reports whether it created a new shared database.
- Keeps the v0.5.4 item database bridge fix.
